title: Open the property listing for Thompson St #6
test_steps: Open the RealEstateApp. | Navigate to the property listing for Thompson St #6.
expected_result: The property listing for Thompson St #6 is displayed.

title: Verify the property title and details
test_steps: Open the property listing for Thompson St #6. | Verify that the property title is 'Thompson St #6'. | Verify that the property details are '$2,750 | 1 Bed' and 'New York, NY 10012'.
expected_result: The property title is 'Thompson St #6'. | The property details are '$2,750 | 1 Bed' and 'New York, NY 10012'.

title: Navigate to the floor plans and pricing section
test_steps: Open the property listing for Thompson St #6. | Tap on the 'Floor Plans and Pricing' section.
expected_result: The user is navigated to the floor plans and pricing section.

title: Verify the floor plan details
test_steps: Open the property listing for Thompson St #6. | Navigate to the floor plans and pricing section. | Verify that the floor plan details are '1 bed / 1 bath', '0 sq ft', and '$2750'.
expected_result: The floor plan details are '1 bed / 1 bath', '0 sq ft', and '$2750'.

title: Click on the 'VIEW ALL' button
test_steps: Open the property listing for Thompson St #6. | Navigate to the floor plans and pricing section. | Click on the 'VIEW ALL' button.
expected_result: The user is navigated to the detailed view of the floor plans and pricing.

title: Navigate back to the property details section
test_steps: Open the property listing for Thompson St #6. | Navigate to the floor plans and pricing section. | Click on the 'VIEW ALL' button. | Navigate back to the property details section.
expected_result: The user is navigated back to the property details section.

title: Verify the property details section
test_steps: Open the property listing for Thompson St #6. | Navigate to the property details section.
expected_result: The user is navigated to the property details section.

title: Check for accessibility/usability
test_steps: Open the property listing for Thompson St #6. | Perform a screen reader test to ensure all elements are accessible. | Perform a usability test to ensure all elements are user-friendly.
expected_result: All elements are accessible and user-friendly.
